title: Il principe dalla maschera rossa
writer: Giovanni Addessi, Vittorio Carpignano, Massimo Mida
actors: Frank Latimore, Maria Fiore, Yvonne Furneaux
plot: Duke Altichieri rises to power, after his associate, Cpt. Alberico, kills governor Conte Filippo della Scala. 10 harsh years of tyranny follow, until a mysterious figure appears out of nowhere, helping people in their struggle aga...
